channel.title: TXOne Networks, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TXOne Networks, Inc. (txone).

item.title: CVE-2025-14252 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: An Improper Access Control vulnerability in Advantech SUSI driver (susi.sys) allows attackers to read/write arbitrary memory, I/O ports, and MSRs, resulting in privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and information disclosure. This issue aff…

item.title: CVE-2024-47935 · 6.7 MEDIUM — TXOne Networks StellarProtect (Legacy Mode), StellarEnforce, and Safe Lock Improper Validation of Integrity Check Value Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Validation of Integrity Check Value vulnerability in TXOne Networks StellarProtect (Legacy Mode), StellarEnforce, and Safe Lock allows an attacker to escalate their privileges in the victim’s device. The attacker needs to hijack the DLL file…

item.title: CVE-2024-47934 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — TXOne Networks Portable Inspector Management Program Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in Management Program in TXOne Networks Portable Inspector and Portable Inspector Pro Edition allows remote attacker to crash management service. The Denial of Service situation can be resolved by restarting th…
